'''Plumba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who sat on the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] until [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. He was a member of the Cabal during [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage's]] reign, and later was one of the three [[Tribune]]s, along with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Paltr Carvin]] and [[Challer]]. He was killed by an agent of [[Ysanne Isard]], posing as an antiques dealer, with a [[Sith lanvarok]] as part of Isard's coup against the Tribunal triumvirate.
